description: Add timer UI with modified behavior (no reset after start, only pause/play) and dynamic bonus items based on actual timer remaining time.
steps: Add timer UI to the dashboard in index.html with time inputs (hours/minutes), start/pause/play buttons, and a reset button that hides once timer starts
Implement StudyTimer module in app.js with countdown logic, pause/resume, and session-based state (resets on fresh page load)
Modify bonus items logic to read actual timer remaining seconds and dynamically fill bonus items based on real remaining time
Add timer styling to style.css matching the existing dark theme
Ensure bonus items still use the exact same SpacedRepetitionEngine.scheduleRevision() and history logging as regular items
acceptance_criteria: Timer shows on dashboard with configurable hours/minutes before starting
Once timer starts, the reset button is hidden/removed; only pause and play are available
Timer resets fresh on page load (new session/day)
When all scheduled items are completed, bonus items are calculated based on actual timer remaining time
Bonus items are dynamically filled: deferred items first, then items due tomorrow, sorted by overdue first then struggled
No changes to spaced repetition intervals, feedback logic, mastery levels, or scheduling logic
Bonus items use the exact same SpacedRepetitionEngine.scheduleRevision() and handleFeedback flow
verification: Verify JS syntax with node --check app.js
Verify spaced repetition logic is unchanged
findings: StudyTimer module added with session-based state (resets on page load). Timer UI shows configurable hours/minutes before start; once started only pause/play are available. getBonusItems now accepts optional timerRemainingMinutes param - when timer is active it uses real remaining time, otherwise falls back to budget-based calculation. SpacedRepetitionEngine unchanged. JS syntax verified with node --check.
